LanguageData.Create_new_stockpiles_at_this_priority: Create new stockpiles at this priority
LanguageData.Where_items_are_already_in_stockpiles_cr: Where items are already in stockpiles, create a stockpile at a higher priority, overriding the value above
LanguageData.Unable_to_use_a_higher_priority_for_new_: Unable to use a higher priority for new stockpile, item was already in a {maximumPriority} priority stockpile
LanguageData.Reallow_this_item_in_its_stockpile: Reallow this item in its stockpile
LanguageData.Disallow_this_item_in_its_current_stockp: Disallow this item in its current stockpile
LanguageData.Stockpile_will_no_longer_allow_label_in_: {stockpile} will no longer allow {label} in it
LanguageData.Create_a_stockpile_specifically_for_this: Create a stockpile specifically for this item type.
LanguageData.There_are_no_shared_categories_for_the_i: There are no shared categories for the items selected.
